instrument: EU–UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement, Annex 3 (Product-specific rules of origin)
note: DRAFT transcription of the TCA product-specific rules for HS Chapters 72–73. Every entry is illustrative until the trade-law advisor validates the wording against the published Annex 3 text. Do not rely on these entries for a preference claim.

rules.ruleText: Production from materials of any heading, except that of the product (CTH).
rules.draftNote: Confirm exact Annex 3 wording for primary iron/steel forms.

rules.ruleText: Production from materials of any heading, except that of the product (CTH); certain flat-rolled products require production from ingots, other primary forms or semi-finished materials of heading 72.06 or 72.07.
rules.draftNote: Confirm the semi-finished-materials condition against Annex 3.

rules.ruleText: Production from ingots or other primary forms or semi-finished materials of heading 72.06 or 72.07.
rules.draftNote: Confirm exact Annex 3 wording for bars, rods, angles, shapes and sections.

rules.ruleText: Production from semi-finished materials of heading 72.07.
rules.draftNote: Confirm exact Annex 3 wording for wire of iron or non-alloy steel.

rules.ruleText: Production from materials of any heading, except that of the product (CTH).
rules.draftNote: Several tube/pipe headings carry specific exceptions — confirm per heading.

rules.ruleText: Production from materials of any heading, except that of the product (CTH).
Production from materials of any heading, except that of the product (CTH).
